ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Welcome to this charming, well maintained home in Titusville! Offering 1,630sqft under air, this 3-bedroom, 2- bath residence features a desirable split plan providing both comfort and privacy. The spacious living area is filled with abundant natural light from Large windows, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere throughout. The layout flows seamlessly into an oversized and enclosed patio -- perfect for year-round living, entertaining or transforming into your dream space. With multiple access points leading to the enclosed patio, the layout offers exceptional flexibility to suit your lifestyle.  The oversized garage is a stand out features built-in and large window, creating a functional and well lit workspace. Perfect for a workshop, storage, or hobby space. Outside, the fully fence yard with double gates offers plenty of room for outdoor activities, relaxing, and ample space to add a pool, carport or create your own private tropical oasis. Recent updates include a newer HVAC system, water heater, and updated flooring (2025), giving peace of mind and modern appeal! Additional features include a shed, washer and dryer that convey, and no rental restrictions making this an excellent opportunity for homeowners, investors, or those seeking a second home. Ideally, located in a quiet, established neighborhood, near shopping, dining, in major employers like Kennedy Space Center, SpaceX, Lockheed, and Boeing. Enjoy the excitement of rocket launches right from your backyard an iconic Space Coast experience! Just a short drive to Playalinda Beach, New Smyrna Beach and Orlando, offering the perfect balance of convenience and coastal living. With solid bones and endless potential this home is ready for its next owner to add their personal touch and truly make it. 2023 Yamaha jet ski is not included in the sale but for sale, please contact listing agent. Open house 4/4, 4/5, & 4/7.
